title: Add Manager bio section with Allen A. information

requirements.text: Create a 'Meet the Manager' section on the homepage (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) featuring Allen A., Manager of Bodyshape Fitness, with the uploaded photo (90s.jpg) and the provided biography text emphasizing his experience in the fitness industry, the gym's reputation as the number one gym in Independence, KY, state-of-the-art equipment, top-tier facilities, commitment to member wellness and success, and the supportive community that empowers individuals at every fitness level

quotes:
Meet the Manager
Business owner information
Allen A.

Manager

With years of experience in the fitness industry, I am proud to serve as the Manager of BodyShape Fitness, where we have earned our reputation as the number one gym in Independence, KY. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in our state-of-the-art equipment and top-tier facilities, which set us apart from the competition. At BodyShape Fitness, we prioritize our members' wellness and success, providing a supportive community that empowers individuals at every fitness level. Join us today and discover why we're the go-to destination for fitness enthusiasts in the area!

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Meet the Manager' section appears on the homepage
The section displays the uploaded photo 90s.jpg of Allen A.
The section includes the title 'Manager' and name 'Allen A.'
The complete biography text provided by the user is displayed
The section is styled consistently with the rest of the homepage design
The section emphasizes the gym's reputation, equipment quality, and community focus

requirements.text: Add the uploaded manager photo (90s.jpg) as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/ and reference it in the Meet the Manager section
acceptanceCriteria: The 90s.jpg image is stored in frontend/public/assets/generated/
The Meet the Manager section correctly references and displays the image
The image is responsive and displays properly on mobile and desktop devices

constraints: Do not modify backend files as this is purely a frontend content change
Do not alter immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Maintain consistency with existing homepage sections and styling
nonGoals: Adding contact information or phone number for Allen A.
Modifying the testimonials or other existing sections
Changing the overall page layout or color scheme
